goal: Wire the proven-in-tests Node routing loop (router.mjs, reflex.mjs, recorder.mjs) into the ACTUAL live request path via a new always-on Node gateway that transparently fronts whichever :4000 serving substrate is active (litellm/bifrost/helicone), so the design can be traced and proven at runtime — with OTel spans, a Grafana dashboard, and live smoke-test assertions as the proof — instead of asserted only in docs.

phases.goal: Stand up route-gateway as an always-on Node HTTP server that transparently fronts whichever :4000 serving substrate is active (litellm/bifrost/helicone), with ZERO behavior change: pure passthrough proxy first, proving the seam before any routing/judge/recording logic is added. litellm/bifrost/helicone move to internal-only ports; route-gateway claims host :4000 uniformly across all three profiles.
definition_of_done: cmd: node --check scripts/gateway-server.mjs
cmd: docker compose config  — the compose file still parses with the new service + port changes
cmd: ! grep -n '"4000:' docker-compose.yml | grep -E 'litellm|bifrost|helicone'  — none of the three providers bind host :4000 anymore
cmd: grep -n 'route-gateway' docker-compose.yml  — the new service is defined
cmd: ./smoke-test.sh  — every existing assertion (tier answers, fall-through, privacy pin, metrics) still passes unmodified, through the new proxy
grep:absent: TODO|FIXME in scripts/gateway-server.mjs

phases.goal: Wire router.mjs's route() into the live proxy: an incoming request with metadata.agentType gets category-floor + budget-steered tier selection; a request with an explicit tier alias in `model` (including tier-private) bypasses routing entirely — unchanged passthrough, preserving the privacy pin's fail-closed short-circuit ahead of any routing logic.
definition_of_done: cmd: node --check scripts/gateway-server.mjs
cmd: node --test scripts/__tests__/gateway-server.test.mjs  — agentType routing, explicit-tier bypass, and router-throw-degrades-gracefully tests pass
grep: pinnedPrivate|tier-private in scripts/gateway-server.mjs  — the privacy short-circuit is checked BEFORE router.mjs is ever called
grep:absent: TODO|FIXME in scripts/gateway-server.mjs

phases.goal: Wire reflex.mjs into the live response path: a scorable-tier (tier-fast/tier-heavy) answer gets judged and escalated to tier-frontier on a low score. Prove — through the LIVE gateway, not just unit tests — that tier-private (and every non-scorable tier) NEVER reaches the judge or leaves the box, end to end.
definition_of_done: cmd: node --check scripts/gateway-server.mjs

cmd: node --test scripts/__tests__/gateway-server-reflex.test.mjs  — escalate-on-low-score, keep-on-high-score, and tier-private-zero-egress-calls tests pass against the live server (supertest-style, not mocked reflex.mjs internals)
grep: reflex in scripts/gateway-server.mjs  — reflex.mjs is actually invoked from the live path
grep:absent: TODO|FIXME in scripts/gateway-server.mjs

prose: the tier-private live-egress-count assertion is the phase's centerpiece evidence — cite the actual test run output, not just 'tests pass,' in the phase evidence file (mirrors the rigor of the parent pipeline's phase 2).

phases.goal: Wire recorder.mjs into the live path: every request (including reflex escalations, as a negative/positive per D11) gets a real DRACO row logged asynchronously, never blocking the response.
definition_of_done: cmd: node --check scripts/gateway-server.mjs

cmd: node --test scripts/__tests__/gateway-server-recorder.test.mjs  — async fire-and-forget (response not blocked on recorder), corpus-growth-by-N, and real-embedding (RUFLO_REQUIRE_REAL_EMBEDDINGS=1 never throws in the live path) tests pass
grep: recorder in scripts/gateway-server.mjs  — recorder.mjs is actually invoked from the live path
grep:absent: TODO|FIXME in scripts/gateway-server.mjs

phases.goal: Emit an OTel span per gateway decision carrying ruflo.route.{tier,floor,category,budget_rung,escalated,judge_score} attributes alongside the existing gen_ai.* spans, and extend the collector's spanmetrics connector so these become Prometheus-queryable dimensions — the machine-readable half of 'prove it's happening at runtime.'
definition_of_done: cmd: node --check scripts/gateway-server.mjs
cmd: docker compose config  — collector config changes still parse
grep: ruflo.route in scripts/gateway-server.mjs  — the span attributes are emitted
grep: ruflo.route in config/observability/otel-collector-config.yaml  — the connector dimensions are extended

prose: a live request's span is visible in the collector's debug exporter output (or a Prometheus query against the new dimension) — cite the actual query/output in phase evidence, not just 'spans configured.'

phases.goal: Give the routing decision loop a Grafana dashboard — the graphical proof: tier-share over time, escalation rate, budget-demotion rungs, DRACO corpus growth rate, and judge-score distribution, all reading from the Prometheus dimensions phase 4 added. Auto-provisioned (no manual click-ops), matching the existing datasource-provisioning convention.
definition_of_done: cmd: docker compose config  — the new volume mounts parse
cmd: test -f config/observability/dashboards/routing-decisions.json && jq -e '.panels | length >= 5' config/observability/dashboards/routing-decisions.json >/dev/null  — the five panels exist
cmd: test -f config/observability/grafana-dashboards-provisioning.yml
grep: routing-decisions in docker-compose.yml  — the dashboard is actually mounted into the grafana service

prose: a screenshot (or exported PNG) of the live dashboard, taken after running smoke-test.sh (phase 6) at least once so the panels have real data, attached as phase evidence — the graphical proof this whole plan exists to produce.

phases.goal: Extend smoke-test.sh with assertions that actually exercise the live decision path end-to-end: a forced known-bad local answer escalates to frontier; a real DRACO row lands after a real call; tier-private never leaves the box through the live gateway. The scripted counterpart to phase 5's visual proof.
definition_of_done: cmd: ./smoke-test.sh  — every assertion, old and new, passes against the live route-gateway
grep: escalat in smoke-test.sh  — the escalation drill is present
grep: corpus|draco in smoke-test.sh  — the corpus-growth check is present

phases.goal: Now that router.mjs/reflex.mjs/recorder.mjs actually run live, correct every doc and pipeline note that either understated it (their own STATUS headers, now stale) or previously OVERCLAIMED it before this plan shipped — so the docs finally match the code in both directions.
definition_of_done: grep:absent: NOT in the live request path in scripts/lib/router.mjs scripts/lib/reflex.mjs scripts/lib/recorder.mjs
grep: live-routing-cutover|gateway-server.mjs in docs/research/ruvector-gateway-rationale.md  — the correction cites this plan
grep: live-routing-cutover|gateway-server.mjs in docs/guide/reference/tiers-and-routing.md

prose: the .autopilot/pipeline.yml correction is an ADDENDUM (dated, explaining what was wrong and why), not a silent rewrite of the original phase-7 text — preserving the historical record of the mistake this whole audit started from.

summary: route-gateway.mjs: byte-for-byte passthrough proxy on :4000; litellm/bifrost/helicone internal-only. Crash-safety fix (client-disconnect races) found+fixed in Tier-3 review, 2 regression tests added. 198 tests green; live smoke-test.sh parity verified byte-identical vs direct litellm. Follow-up (non-blocking): .env.example lacks GATEWAY_UPSTREAM_URL docs (file write-blocked here).

router.mjs route() wired live: metadata.agentType rewrites model to router-resolved tier; explicit tier alias (incl. tier-private) bypasses routing entirely, checked first, unconditionally. Body now buffered (10MB cap, 413 above) to allow inspection/rewrite. Tier-3 review (self+independent) found and fixed 2 real bugs pre-merge: req.destroy() on oversized-body killed the shared res socket before a 413 could be sent (hung the client); docker-compose route-gateway only mounted scripts/, not config/, so router-policy.example.json was invisible in-container and every agentType silently floored to tier-fast. Both verified fixed live (docker up + curl). 206 tests green (191 pre-existing + 15 new).

reflex.mjs wired live into the response path: scorable-tier (fast/heavy) answers judged, escalated to frontier on low score; every other tier (private above all) never buffered/judged, checked before response buffering as defense-in-depth alongside reflex.mjs's own isScorable. Tier-3/pentest review (self+2 independent agents) found and fixed TWO real privacy-pin bypasses: (1) mis-cased/whitespace 'Tier-Private'+agentType fell through exact-string bypass, got routed to a scorable tier, leaked prompt to judge+escalation calls -- fixed via reflex.mjs's own canonicalTier(). (2) Unicode homoglyph (Cyrillic і for Latin i) defeated even the canonicalized check (NFKC would not have caught it -- distinct codepoint, no compatibility decomposition) -- fixed by refusing to let any non-ASCII-tier-shaped model string be promoted to a real tier via routing at all, forwarding it unchanged so litellm's own alias lookup fails loud instead of silently leaking. Both exploits verified fixed against the REAL running docker stack, not just tests. Also fixed a low-severity stream-detection gap (stream:"true" string coercion). 213 tests green (191 pre-existing + 22 new, including regression tests pinning both fixed exploits). agentic-qe MCP fleet unavailable this session (aqe not on PATH, no MCP connection) -- Tier-4 covered instead by native qe-pentest-validator + qe-code-reviewer agents, per gate.md's absence-never-blocks guidance.

recorder.mjs wired live: every served request gets a real fire-and-forget DRACO row (real embedding, tier, category, judge_score, cost, latency, escalated, REAL success outcome). Tier-3 code-review workflow (4 finders + verify pass) found and fixed 6 real defects pre-merge: tier-frontier's own direct serves recorded cost:0 (usage never captured on the non-judged buffering path) -- fixed by extending buffering to all TIER_LADDER tiers while judging stays scoped to isScorable; escalated requests recorded cost:0 despite a real billable frontier call -- fixed via an injected escalate() callback (gw.chat() instead of chatContent()) capturing the frontier call's real usage without touching reflex.mjs's own code; two response-termination paths (upstream unreachable, oversized/aborted body) never recorded their D11 negative outcome -- fixed, recordServed now also fires immediately when res is already settled; a pre-existing (phase-2) content-encoding/content-length mismatch fixed opportunistically; 5 duplicated writeHead/end/record call sites consolidated into one respondAndRecord helper. Verified against the REAL docker stack (litellm+ollama, real Qwen3.6 models) before AND after the fixes -- health/tier-answers/fallback/privacy-pin all green. Discovered mid-phase: route-gateway's container (node:24-alpine, bumped from node:22 per a separate user request -- Node 22 EOL Apr 2027) can't yet resolve @ruvector/rvf|ruvllm (glibc-only native bindings, no musl build) -- recorder correctly fails open there rather than crashing; a new phase 4 was inserted into the plan (grounded via the RuvNet brain) to fix this before phase 6's corpus-growth smoke assertion needs it. 223 tests green (213 pre-existing + 10 new, including 4 regression tests pinning the code-review fixes).

route-gateway rebuilt on glibc (node:24-slim, npm ci): @ruvector/rvf+ruvllm resolve linux-arm64-gnu bindings live (verified, not stubbed). Corpus moved to a named volume; verified surviving a real rebuild+recreate (4 DRACO rows intact, prompt_hash-keyed). 223 tests green; reviewer found+applied 1 fix (narrowed config COPY).

route-gateway emits one OTel span per decision (ruflo.route.{tier,floor,category,budget_rung,escalated,judge_score}), hand-built OTLP/HTTP JSON (no SDK dep), fired from the SAME fire-and-forget choke point as the DRACO recorder so no termination path drops telemetry. Collector spanmetrics dimensions extended (tier/escalated/budget_rung). Verified live: span visible in debug exporter AND as Prometheus gen_ai_calls_total{ruflo_route_tier=...} labels (pinned 0.116.0 collector image is broken in this env, confirmed pre-existing/unrelated via bare docker run; verified against :latest instead). 236 tests green; reviewer found+closed 1 test-coverage gap.

Grafana dashboard (5 panels: tier-share, escalation-rate, budget-rungs, DRACO-growth proxy, judge-score distribution), file-based provisioning, auto-mounted. New ruflo.route.judge_score_bucket dimension (operator-approved bucketing, since raw judge_score stays span-only per phase 5's cardinality reasoning). Reviewer found+fixed 2 real query bugs (barchart wrong shape, escalation-rate 0/0->No data) before merge, verified fixed via direct Prometheus queries. Live: real screenshot via CDP session-cookie auth (no image-renderer plugin installed). 238 tests green.

smoke-test.sh: escalation drill (mock_response forces a bad answer, real judge + real frontier escalation proven live), DRACO corpus-growth check (nonce prompt, count +1, byte-size sanity), privacy-pin note updated. Found+fixed 2 REAL pre-existing bugs (since phase 2/3, never caught until this phase's live escalation drill): route-gateway's compose service never had LITELLM_MASTER_KEY, and a JS {...opts.env, GW} spread footgun silently discarded every other real env var for internal judge/escalate/budget calls. Both fixed + 2 regression tests added, verified empirically failing pre-fix / passing post-fix. Reviewer found 2 more issues (corpus baseline race, ambiguous escalation-skip message), both fixed. 240 tests green.
